reference_images.label: reflect_academy_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Academy hall color rhythm, duel staging, card layout balance, and warm-versus-cool lighting anchor.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_player
reference_images.purpose: Player silhouette, costume layering, hand pose, and magical focus posture anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteBundle for the floor strip and place it on the midground layer under actors.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load world/world_duel_platform_960x180.png through AssetServer before character spawn and register the handle under world_duel_platform_960x180.
runtime_notes: Keep the platform centered in world space so animation roots line up with the rune circle.
The transparent edge lets the hall background show through around the trim.
Collision and stance anchors read from the authored floor strip rather than procedural shapes.

context.usage: Lower duel platform with brass trim, rune circle, and polished wood floor where the player stance anchors.

shape.silhouette: Wide floor strip with a centered rune ring and shallow front bevel.

specs.lighting: Soft cyan rune bloom sits inside the center circle and warm edge light catches the trim.

acceptance_criteria: Centered rune circle diameter is 240 px with a clean open zone for the player silhouette.
Front edge trim remains a continuous gold band with no broken segments.
